title: dank mod
description: it adds minecraft stuff that has to do with dank memes
body: this minecraft mod adds a lot of mobs, items, blocks and stuff that are themed around 2019/2016 dank memes such as datboi, pepe the frog and others, it also adds a liquid known as dank juice which when you eat or craft into a dank bomb and hit another player with it, it shows a gui with datboi and temporarially stuns them giving them slowness, nausea and blindness in one effect known as dank trip, it also adds new building blocks such as the deepfried dirt line. this mod is meant to be played either with friends or on a server but can be played alone.
